title: Sailor Moon
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across the five 90s TV series: Sailor Moon S1 (46) + Sailor Moon R (43) + Sailor Moon S (38) + Sailor Moon SuperS (39) + Sailor Moon Sailor Stars (34) = 200 episodes. Source manga is complete at 60 acts (AniList lists 61 chapters, counting a side-story extra), using the shinsouban/renewal 60-act numbering. The 90s anime is a loose adaptation with substantial filler, so the mapping is arc-level: each TV series corresponds to one manga arc rather than a tight 1:1 chapter cadence. Notable filler includes Sailor Moon R's opening Makaiju/Doom Tree episodes (anime-original) before the Black Moon story begins.

movies.title: Sailor Moon R: The Movie
movies.note: Canon side-story feature in the classic continuity; original tale of Fiore and the Xenian flower, set after the Black Moon arc.

movies.title: Sailor Moon S the Movie: Hearts in Ice
movies.note: Canon side-story feature loosely based on Naoko Takeuchi's 'The Lover of Princess Kaguya' short; slots within the Sailor Moon S / Infinity period.

movies.title: Sailor Moon SuperS the Movie: Black Dream Hole
movies.note: Canon original side-story feature in the classic continuity, set during the SuperS / Dream period.
